title: Set up presets and ctest for a project
description: Create CMakePresets.json with configure and build presets and register tests so ctest runs them reproducibly.
body: Use when standardizing how a project is configured, built, and tested. Do not leave configure flags as undocumented shell commands. Actions: write configurePresets with generator and cache variables and matching buildPresets; include(CTest) and register tests with add_test; verify cmake --preset configures and ctest runs the suite. Validation signals include a fresh checkout building and testing through the presets and ctest reporting passes. Risk boundary: tests or flags left outside presets drift between environments, so capture them in versioned files.
